options.content:
## App View of Cost Analysis.
cost and resource analysis of pods, selected by Namespace and pod's LabelSelector. 
version: v1.0.4. [Help Doc](https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/215497.html) 

This cost is without discount.

##### How to config LabelSelector: 
LabelSelector is for pod's metadata label key-value. 
format support: 
```app=ack-cost-exporter``` 
```app:ack-cost-exporter``` 

 
if your pod label key have: ```/```、```.```、```-```, you need transport it to ```_```, and input should delete all ```"``` 
e.g. 
pod label: 
```"sparkoperator.k8s.io/submission-id":"db08a66a-c0b7-4d32-8013-02ac4f8eff4c"``` 
you can input LabelSelector: 
```sparkoperator_k8s_io_submission_id:db08a66a-c0b7-4d32-8013-02ac4f8eff4c```

panels.title: Application Cost Dashboard Usage-Current Filter Criteria: Namespace: ($Namespace) WorkloadType: ($ControllerType) WorkloadName: ($ControllerName) LabelKey: ($LabelKey) LabelValue: ($LabelValue)

targets.expr:
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

panels.description:
Cost applied by the selected time range of the market

Which is calculate by Σ(Pod Request/Node Capacity)*EachNodePrice

Warning:

This is a estimate data by compute resource.
If there is "No Data", please wait for at least one hour's data.

targets.expr:
sum(

(
#cpu分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) * ($__interval_ms/1000) 
* 
#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#内存分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) * ($__interval_ms/1000) 
*
#内存权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#ECI成本
sum(sum(label_replace(label_replace(pod_current_price{exported_namespace=~"$Namespace"}, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "exported_pod", "(.*)")) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod) * ($__interval_ms/1000) 

+

# GPU节点
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, PodName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

)
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod))

sum(

(
#cpu分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) 
* 
#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#内存分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) 
*
#内存权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#ECI成本
sum(sum(label_replace(label_replace(max_over_time(pod_current_price{exported_namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval]), "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "exported_pod", "(.*)")) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod) 

+

# GPU节点
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, PodName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod)

)

* on(pod) group_left max(sum_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[3599s:15s])) by(pod) * 15

* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod))

panels.title: Application Cost

panels.description: Max / Min Pod Num in this time range.

targets.expr: count(sum(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} ) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) > 0)

sum(sum(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} ) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) )

count(sum(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} ) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod)
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod)
 > 0)

panels.title: Apply current number of copies

panels.description:
Cluster Ratio (Resource Ratio of Cluster) = CPU request of pods / CPU request of cluster.

Namespace Ratio (Resource Ratio of Namespace) = CPU request of pods / CPU request of selected namespace.
panels.title: Application accounts for the entire cluster/namespace resource utilization

panels.description: Price of each CPU Core of pods.

targets.expr:
max(node_current_price) by (node) * on(node)

max((sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod, node)

 * on(pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
 * on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod)
 
 / on(pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores[$__interval])) by (pod))
) by (node)

* 3600

panels.title: Hourly cost of the node

panels.description:
Uptime is pods's total runtime (hours).
Core*Hours is pods's total CPU core*hours.

targets.expr:
# sum(max(max_over_time(kube_pod_info[$__interval])) by(pod) * on(pod) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval]) * on (pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
sum(max(sum_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}[3599s:15s])) by(pod) * 15 / 3600
* on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on (pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod))

sum(sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right 
max(sum_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[3599s:15s])) by(pod) * 15 / 3600
* on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on (pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod))
targets.legendFormat: When the application consumes total cores (Core * Hour):

panels.title: Application running time/total number of core-time resources consumed

panels.description:
CPU / Memory Utilization of pods.
Usage / Request.
panels.title: Computing Resource Utilization

matcher.options: Pod Cost Per Core Hour (total cost per selected time range)
Total number of cores consumed by the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

targets.expr:
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_node_status_capacity_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval]))by(node) * on(node) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod)

 * on(pod) group_right sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
 * on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod)
 
 / on(pod) sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores[$__interval])) by (pod) * ($__interval_ms/1000) > 0

# sum(max(max_over_time(kube_pod_info[$__interval])) by(pod,node) * on(pod) group_left max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod,node) 
# * on (pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
# * on(pod) group_left max(
# label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
# or 
# max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
# ) by (pod) > 0
max(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{node!=""}[$__interval])) by(pod,node) * on(pod) group_left 
max(sum_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}[3599s:15s])) by(pod) * 15 / 3600
* on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on (pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod)
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval]) ) by(replicaset)
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod)

sum(
 
label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

* on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) 
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod)

/ on(node) group_left 

label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

) by (node, pod)

sum(
 
label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

* on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) 
* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod)

/ on(node) group_left 

label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

) by (node, pod)

(
#cpu分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) 
* 
#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#内存分摊成本
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0) by (pod) 
*
#内存权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

+ 

#ECI成本
sum(sum(label_replace(label_replace(max_over_time(pod_current_price{exported_namespace=~"$Namespace"}[$__interval]), "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "exported_pod", "(.*)")) by (pod) * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(max_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod) 

+

# GPU节点
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, PodName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} * on(pod) group_right max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) or max(max_over_time(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}[$__interval])) by (pod) * 0 ) by (pod)

)

* on(pod) group_left max(sum_over_time(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}[3599s:15s])) by(pod) * 15

* on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(max_over_time(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}[$__interval]), "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(max_over_time(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod)

renameByName.Value #E (lastNotNull): Pod Cost Per Core Hour (total cost per selected time range)
renameByName.Value #F (sum): Total number of cores consumed by the pod (Cost Per Core Hour)

panels.description:
Cost (Cost Per Hour) is the total cost of pods per hour.
Cost Per Core * Hour is the Price of each CPU Core.
 

Which is calculate by Σ(Pod Request/Node Capacity)*EachNodePrice

Warning:

This is a estimate data by compute resource.
If there is "No Data", please wait for at least one hour's data.

 * on(pod) group_left max(

 or 
 max_over_time(kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}[$__interval])
 ) by (pod)
 
 / on(pod) group_left sum(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores[$__interval])) by (pod))
) by (node)
) by (chargeType)
* 3600

panels.title: Pod Resource Usage Ranking-Sorted by CPU Usage

panels.description:
Sort by WasteRate.
WasteRate = 1 - CPUUtilization

CPUUtilization = CPUUsage / CPURequest

MemroyUtilization = MemoryUsage / MemroyRequest

sortBy.displayName: 资源闲置率(Pod未被使用的计算资源占已分配资源的比重)

targets.expr:
sum(
 
label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

* on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) 

/ on(node) group_left 

label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 

) by (pod)
 * on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod)

(
1 

- 
## 1. CPU 利用率
(
 sum(max(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}[2m])) by (pod, container)) by (pod) / sum(max(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} > 0) by (pod, container)) by (pod) * on(pod) max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$Namespace", phase=~"Running", job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (pod) 
 > 0
 or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0
)

- 

## 2. GPU显存利用率

(
 sum(label_replace(label_replace(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,PodName), "pod", "$1", "PodName", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 
* on(pod) group_left max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) 
/ on(node) group_left 
label_replace(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s])) by (NodeName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)") 
) by (pod) > 0
 or max(kube_pod_labels{namespace=~"$Namespace", $FormatKeyValue}) by (pod) * 0
)
) * on(pod) group_left max(
 label_replace(kube_pod_info{job="_kube-state-metrics", created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "replicaset", "$1", "created_by_name", "(.+)") * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType",owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}) by (replicaset) 
 or 
 kube_pod_owner{job="_kube-state-metrics", owner_kind=~"$ControllerType", owner_name=~"$ControllerName"}
 ) by (pod)

panels.title: Pod resource idle ranking

renameByName.Value #G (lastNotNull): Resource idle rate (the proportion of unused computing resources of the pod to allocated resources)

list.label: Workload type
list.name: ControllerType
list.query: Deployment : Deployment, StatefulSet : StatefulSet, DaemonSet : DaemonSet, Job : Job

list.label: cost allocation model
list.name: cost_allocation_method

options.text: CPU-内存混合模型（推荐权重）
CPU-内存混合模型（自定义权重）

list.query: CPU模型 : 1, 内存模型 : 0, CPU-内存混合模型（推荐权重） : -10000, CPU-内存混合模型（自定义权重） : -1

list.description: Cost allocation model takes effect after "CPU-memory hybrid model (custom weight)" is selected
list.label: CPU Weight Setting (%)
